webServers.name: Apache
webServers.notes: Apache HTTP Server — versions prior to 2.4.62 are affected by known CVEs (e.g. CVE-2024-38476, CVE-2024-38477). Keep up-to-date with the latest stable 2.4.x release.

webServers.name: nginx
webServers.notes: nginx — versions prior to 1.26.2 (stable) or 1.27.x (mainline) may be affected by HTTP/2 denial-of-service vulnerabilities. Use the latest stable branch.

webServers.name: Microsoft-IIS
webServers.notes: Internet Information Services — IIS 8.5 and earlier are on extended/end-of-support. IIS 10.0 (Windows Server 2016/2019/2022) is the minimum recommended version.
